case_title: KISLOWSKI, CHRISTINE vs. JENSEN, ELENA MARIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KISLOWSKI, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT JENSEN, ELENA MARIA JENSEN, ARTHUR DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-30-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-03-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-10-1996
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KISLOWSKI, CHRISTINE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-30-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO ALLOW FOR WITHDRAWL OF ATTORNEY. IF PLTF'S ATTY. WITHDRAWS HE IS TO NOTIFY NAMED PLAINTIFFS THAT THEY MUST ATTEND THE OSC ON 12/4/96. HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KISLOWSKI, CHRISTINE HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PLAINTIFF'S STATEMENT IN RESPONSE TO TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER GOOD CAUSE EXISTS; PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT & ADVISED THAT SHE OR HER NEW ATTY OF RECORD SHALL APPEAR IN DEPT. 4 AT @ PM, DEC. 4, L996.

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-04-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 12/4/96 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR ANSWER OF DEFT(S). PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR JAN-17-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEYS' MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTY OF RECORD
WITHDRAWL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD: ANDERSEN, JOHN GREGORY WITHDRAWN, REPLACED BY PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR KISLOWSKI, CHRISTINE
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-17-1997, DISMISSAL STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS
